creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
The current version(v2.3.2) available for FreeBSD is not beeing maintained anymore, since the release of version 2.4.x.

See here: https://www.elastic.co/support/eol
Latest Release: https://www.elastic.co/downloads/past-releases/logstash-2-4-1

Available version @ ports: 2.3.2
Latest version @ upstream: 2.4.1

Logstash 2.4.x is compatible with Elasticsearch5, while 2.3.x isn't. So it would be cool to have 2.4.x, instead of beeing forced to update to Logstash5.

Thanks for taking a look at it.
